sqlMap.select: select * from displayfield where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into displayfield(dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, field delimiter seq ) values (#dropdownno:NUMERIC#, #propertyno:NUMERIC#, #propertyversionno:NUMERIC#, #metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #field# #delimiter# #seq# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('displayfield') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select displayfieldno, field, delimiter, seq, dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from displayfield where displayfieldno = #displayfieldno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update displayfield set
field = #field# field = null delimiter = #delimiter# delimiter = null seq = #seq# seq = null
where displayfieldno = #displayfieldno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from displayfield where displayfieldno = #displayfieldno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from displayfield where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select displayfieldno, field, delimiter, seq, dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from displayfield where displayfieldno = #displayfieldno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select displayfieldno, dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, field, delimiter from displayfield where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
